title: Dragon Mounts
description: Dragon Mounts is a mod that adds 8 ridable dragons into your worlds. The true reward after beating the Ender Dragon!
body:
![Dragon Mounts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63196f5c49747acc5dc8854d2b097a2f86c6300c_0.webp)

**[Minecraft Forum Thread](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/wip-mods/1439594-dragon-mounts-r46-wip)**

**[GitHub Page](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts) | [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts/issues)**

Recommended to include the recipe viewer: [Just Enough Items (1.8 to 1.12)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [Not Enough Items (1.1 to 1.12)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nei)

***⋆ Dragon Mounts 2 - [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-2)**

## Support Dragon Mounts
**Discord:** [https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K](https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K)

**YouTube:** [https://youtube.com/@dragonmounts](https://youtube.com/@dragonmounts)

## About Dragon Mounts
**Dragon Mounts** is a mod that allows to hatch eight different dragons and ride them, when they are grown up. The player needs a __Dragon Egg__ to get started and later on __Raw Fish__ and a __Saddle__ to ride it. The Dragon Egg can be obtained after killing the __Ender Dragon__ or can be found in dungeon chests (however, this is disabled by default).

## Getting Started
- To hatch a dragon egg, you'll need to find a good place for it first. If you found one, place the egg block and simply right click it. The egg will then start to hatch, which will take a while.
- Once grown up, you can tame the dragon with raw fish. It will then follow and protect you like other pets.
- You can command tamed dragons to lay down or stand up with the bone item.
- To ride a tamed dragon, use a saddle on it, then right click it without holding an action item.
- To heal injured dragons, feed it with raw fish, chicken, beef or porkchop (four hearts) or with rotten flesh (two hearts).
- You can control the dragon with the Carrot On A Stick while riding it.

## Cheats
The Dragon Mounts mod offers two cheats, the player can use when cheats are enabled:

* `/dragon state <State>`: This will set the dragon the player is looking at to a different state. "`egg`", "`hatchling`", "`juvenile`" or "`adult`" can be used on the dragon the player is looking at.
* `/dragon tame`: This will claim the dragon the player is looking at to tame it.

### Mod Configuration
You can enable chest spawning in the `DragonMounts.cfg` file. Open it with a text editor and change "`B:eggsInChests=false`" to "`B:eggsInChests=true`".

## Modern Versions
- **[Dragon Mounts 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-2)** - by Tomanex & The Dragon Mounts Team
- **[Dragon Mounts: Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy)** - by Kay9
- **[Dragon Mounts Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/dmr)** - by Horeaki
- **[Dragon Mounts (1.12.2 Fork)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy-continued)** - by sunconure11

## Dracopedia - The Dragon Mounts Encyclopedia
For the full comprehensive guide of the mod and frequently asked questions, head over to our official **[Dragon Mounts Wiki](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts/wiki)**.

## Issues / Bug Reports
If you found something that doesn't look right, is probably a bug, please head over to our **[Github](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts)** to report it! Your bugs are most likely to be seen there versus our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K)** server.
